testcase.name: ecommerceTest

failure.message: LOGIN FAILED! Expected to reach inventory page but got error. User: invalid_user expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.name: ecommerceTest

failure.message: CHECKOUT FAILED! Expected to reach checkout step 2 but validation prevented it. Empty details not allowed! expected [true] but found [false]
